mission.title: lima: File system change events (inotify) support for mounted directories
mission.description: File system change events (inotify) support for mounted directories. Requested by 36+ users.

steps.title: Check current lima setup
steps.description:
Verify your lima version and configuration:
```bash
limactl --version
```
This feature requires a working lima installation.

steps.title: Review lima configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant lima configuration:
### Description

From https://github.com/abiosoft/colima/issues/151:

We're using Colima to run Docker in a VM on our macOS laptops. Colima uses Lima under the hood to run this VM.

steps.title: Apply the fix for File system change events (inotify) support for mounted…
steps.description:
> As a personal workaround, that would work(just less performant, performance degrades linearly with the number of files being added).

Yeah, it's not ideal at all.  This is the easiest I could come up with, in case others need it:
```
FOLDER=src
CHKPT=/tmp/checkpoint
touch $CHKPT
while true; do
 
```yaml
FOLDER=src
CHKPT=/tmp/checkpoint
touch $CHKPT
while true; do
  find "$FOLDER" -newer $CHKPT -type f -print -a -exec touch {} \; | grep -q . && touch $CHKPT
  sleep 1
done
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "File system change events (inotify) support for mounted…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
> As a personal workaround, that would work(just less performant, performance degrades linearly with the number of files being added).

Yeah, it's not ideal at all.  This is the easiest I could come up with, in case others need it:
```
FOLDER=src
CHKPT=/tmp/checkpoint
touch $CHKPT
while true; do
  find "$FOLDER" -newer $CHKPT -type f -print -a -exec touch {} \; | grep -q .
codeSnippets:
FOLDER=src
CHKPT=/tmp/checkpoint
touch $CHKPT
while true; do
  find "$FOLDER" -newer $CHKPT -type f -print -a -exec touch {} \; | grep -q . && touch $CHKPT
  sleep 1
done

FOLDER=$1
TOUCH="docker exec -ti my-docker-guest touch"
CHKPT=/tmp/checkpoint
touch $CHKPT
while true; do
  find "$FOLDER" -newer $CHKPT -type f -print -a -exec $TOUCH {} \; | grep . && touch $CHKPT
  sleep 1
done

prerequisites.description: A working lima installation or development environment.
